description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a striking geometric design, featuring a mix of black and white exterior walls and large glass windows. The structure includes a prominent flat roof and an expansive wooden deck area with a pool, visible at the rear. The front of the house has a driveway with a parked car, and the main entryway is set back, framed by large windows. The rear section showcases an open terrace with outdoor seating and a pool, enclosed by horizontal wooden slats for privacy. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a combination of vertical and horizontal panes, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with black and white walls, large glass windows, a flat roof, and a rear wooden deck with a pool. The design features clean lines, asymmetrical windows, and an open terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, and main entryway with large windows and black exterior walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior, flat roof, and the transition to the wooden deck and pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open terrace, pool, wooden privacy slats, and extensive outdoor living space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with black and white wall sections, visible roof, and the car partially seen in the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panes and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with large glass panels, minimal overhang, and direct access from driveway
